rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces property tax revenue. The Comptroller must update anticipated revenue estimates to reflect the new law, but no appropriation is directly blocked. Indirect fiscal pressure may constrain future appropriations.
quote: an itemized estimate of the anticipated revenue based on the laws then in effect that will be received by and for the State from all sources
_note: No direct conflict; §49a governs state appropriations certification, not property tax exemptions. Comptroller must incorporate revised revenue estimates if enacted.
